mission.title: surrealdb: Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session?
mission.description: Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session?. This issue affects 12+ users.

steps.title: Identify surrealdb troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your surrealdb installation:
```bash
surreal version
surreal is-ready
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review surrealdb configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant surrealdb configuration:
### Is your feature request related to a problem?

For apps with sensitive data, I need the token to expire in 15mins and refresh the connection as the user works on it.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Feature:  Refresh Token? Or Refresh Session?
steps.description:
Thank you for submitting this pull request. We really appreciate you spending the time to work on SurrealDB. 🚀 🎉 

## What is the motivation?

To enable record users to receive both a short-lived stateless token (i.e. the current authentication token) as well as a longer-lived stateful token that can be used to obtain additional authentication tokens for a defined duration. These specific stateful tokens are conventionally referred to as "refresh tokens" and they are commonly implemented in

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
